meaning: n.下水,汽艇,发射,发行,投放市场vt.使(船)下水,掷(标枪等),发射(导弹、火箭等),开办,发动,发起vi.起飞,下水,投入,开始
examples: The official launch date is in May.
The Navy is to launch a new warship today.
They decided to launch a pre-emptive strike.
Millennium did launch medicines that it got from acquisitions funded by its lucrative deals.
The Myth Of Stars 06.12.02 Movie stars are absolutely necessary to launch a hit picture.
